description: american tourister is a brand from samsonite Corporation, which has been in existence since 1933. It is a one stop shop for all your travelling bags, sling bags and back packs.American Tourister is proud to make durable and stylish bags to suit any occasion.Height: 39 cmWidth: 33 cmDepth: 21 cmWarranty: 1 yearMade of polyester for durabilityOne main compartment with an asymmetric zip, a laptop compartment to carry an 11.6" laptop with a velcro closure and a mesh pocket with a zipped closureOne compartment on the front with organiser pouches and an asymmetric zip One elasticated pocket on the left sideOne small pocket on the front and a secret compartment at the back with asymmetric zipped openingsPadded haul loop for easy carryingOne adjustable shoulder strap made of polyester and a waist strap with a smart loop for styleBranded zips and branding appliqué d on the frontBack padding for ergonomic comfort and rubber legs at the baseCareClean with a damp cloth when necessary
